query:
INSERT INTO comms_channel_participants (channel_id, user_id, role, left_at)
            VALUES ($1, $2, 'member'::comms_participant_role, NULL)
            ON CONFLICT (channel_id, user_id)
            DO UPDATE SET role = 'member'::comms_participant_role,
                          left_at = NULL,
                          joined_at = now()
